items.title: Amazon WorkSpaces now lets AI agents operate desktop applications (Preview)

items.title: Modernize your workflows: Amazon WorkSpaces now gives AI agents their own desktop (preview)
items.snippet: Amazon WorkSpaces now lets AI agents securely operate legacy desktop applications—without APIs or modernization—using IAM authentication, MCP support, and computer vision within existing security frameworks.

items.title: AWS IAM now provides higher maximum quotas for roles, role trust policies, instance profiles, managed policies, and identity providers

items.title: Securing open proxies in your AWS environment
items.snippet: This article shows you how to identify and secure open proxies in your AWS environment to prevent abuse, protect your IP address reputation, and control costs. An open proxy is a server that forwards traffic on behalf of internet users without requiring…
